author: sleepyhauru
description: Reposts FixTweetBot-style masked fixed social-media URLs for better Discord embeds, suppresses embeds on the original message, and provides an embed-backed settings panel with dropdowns.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load embedfix`. It starts disabled; enable it with `[p]embedfix enable`. Give the bot Manage Messages in watched channels so it can suppress original embeds.
short: Fix broken Discord embeds with an interactive settings panel.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild configuration settings and aggregate counters. It does not store user data.
